header.subtitle: Size your refreshed cluster based on existing metrics

reset.title: Reset all data?
reset.body: All cluster data and scenarios will be cleared. This cannot be undone.

sizingMode.performanceTooltip: Sizes on new-vs-old per-core performance (GHz by default; add SPEC scores in the scenario for precision).

stretch.label: Stretch cluster
stretch.tooltip: Stretched cluster: each site must carry the full workload on failure. Sizing doubles the server count and rounds up to an even number.

toast.exclusionsTrimmed: Some exclusion rules were trimmed from the shared URL due to size. Re-import the source file to reproduce exact per-VM selections.
